Which query correctly returns departments where average salary is above 70000?
optionA: SELECT dept_id FROM employees WHERE AVG(salary) > 70000;
optionB: SELECT dept_id FROM employees GROUP BY dept_id HAVING AVG(salary) > 70000;
optionC: SELECT dept_id FROM employees HAVING AVG(salary) > 70000 GROUP BY dept_id;
optionD: SELECT dept_id FROM employees GROUP BY dept_id WHERE AVG(salary) > 70000;
